context: In crates/anvilml-worker/src/env.rs add ipc_socket_path:&str param to build_worker_env. Insert ANVILML_IPC_SOCKET into the returned map. description: anvilml-worker: replace stdin/stdout IPC transport with Unix socket / Windows named pipe
context: In crates/anvilml-worker/src/managed.rs replace IpcHandles{stdin,stdout} with IpcHandles{reader,writer} (interprocess OwnedRead/WriteHalf). Add ipc_socket_path:String to ManagedWorker. spawn(): build socket path, mkdir parent, bind LocalSocketListener, set ANVILML_IPC_SOCKET via build_worker_env, accept, split, deliver via ipc_tx. Set Command stdin to Stdio::null; keep stderr drain. writer_task/reader_task take OwnedWrite/ReadHalf; framing unchanged. Path convention and Windows pattern in TASKS_PHASE903.md §A2. cargo clippy -p anvilml-worker --features mock-hardware -- -D warnings exits 0.

description: worker: replace stdin/stdout IPC with socket in ipc.py
context: In worker/ipc.py replace sys.stdin.buffer/sys.stdout.buffer with a socket fd. Read ANVILML_IPC_SOCKET env var; open as binary connection (AF_UNIX on Linux/macOS, named pipe CreateFile on Windows). Update read_frame/write_frame to use socket.recv/send instead of stdin/stdout. Remove msvcrt.setmode guard entirely. In worker/tests/test_ipc.py remove windows_binary_mode_guard test; add socketpair round-trip test for read_frame/write_frame. See TASKS_PHASE903.md §A3 for exact Python socket open pattern per platform. pytest worker/tests/ -v exits 0.

description: anvilml-worker: fix GenericFilePath/GenericNamespaced Windows name-type error in spawn and test
context: In crates/anvilml-worker/src/managed.rs fix all to_fs_name::<GenericFilePath>() call sites that handle Windows named pipe paths. GenericFilePath is wrong for named pipes; use GenericNamespaced on Windows. Add cfg-gated helper: #[cfg(unix)] use GenericFilePath, #[cfg(windows)] use GenericNamespaced. Affected: spawn() bind site and respawn_after_death test (socket_path and socket_path2 bind+connect). Exact before/after in TASKS_PHASE903.md §A3x. cargo test -p anvilml-worker --features mock-hardware exits 0. cargo check --workspace --features mock-hardware --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu exits 0.

description: gate: full workspace clean gate after IPC transport rework
context: No source changes. Run and record verbatim output: (1) cargo clippy --workspace --features mock-hardware -- -D warnings; (2) env -i HOME=$HOME PATH=$PATH ANVILML_WORKER_MOCK=1 ANVILML_VENV_PATH=./worker/.venv cargo test --workspace --features mock-hardware; (3) cargo check --workspace --features mock-hardware --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu; (4) python -m pytest worker/tests/ -v. All four must exit 0. Task is COMPLETE only when all four exit 0. Write verbatim outputs as the implementation report body.
